testcase.name: test_client_can_get_withdrawal_history

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'withdrawals': [{'account_holder': 'Test User', 'amount': 50.0, 'bic_swift': None, 'completed_at': '2026-01-25T00:42:43.868692+00:00', ...}, {'account_holder': 'Test User', 'admin_note': 'TEST: Testing refund', 'amount': 50.0, 'bic_swift': None, ...}, {'account_holder': 'Test User', 'amount': 50.0, 'completed_at': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:23:38.499862+00:00', ...}]}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration33_admin_withdrawals.py:591: in test_client_can_get_withdrawal_history assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'withdrawals': [{'account_holder': 'Test User', 'amount': 50.0, 'bic_swift': None, 'completed_at': '2026-01-25T00:42:43.868692+00:00', ...}, {'account_holder': 'Test User', 'admin_note': 'TEST: Testing refund', 'amount': 50.0, 'bic_swift': None, ...}, {'account_holder': 'Test User', 'amount': 50.0, 'completed_at': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:23:38.499862+00:00', ...}]}, list)

testcase.name: test_client_can_get_notifications

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:40.686699+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:33.311307+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:42:43.980376+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:26:26.721386+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-24T22:37:15.251306+00:00', 'data': {'friendship_id': 'e8b6a896-a791-43f3-b405-31cbfcb55a81', 'sender_id': 'e7587bce-51c6-42be-96cd-003174eaf478'}, 'id': '58e17b53-36f1-4bdc-bfa8-8c39405e8c0a', 'is_read': True, ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:22:00.015572+00:00', 'data': {'order_id': '0938b117-ba1c-4266-95f7-1e5617b86ec5', 'total': 514.5}, 'icon': 'shopping-cart', ...}, ...], 'unread_count': 4}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration33_admin_withdrawals.py:623: in test_client_can_get_notifications assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'notifications': [{'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:40.686699+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:47:33.311307+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:42:43.980376+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-25T00:26:26.721386+00:00', 'data': {}, 'icon': 'credit-card', ...}, {'created_at': '2026-01-24T22:37:15.251306+00:00', 'data': {'friendship_id': 'e8b6a896-a791-43f3-b405-31cbfcb55a81', 'sender_id': 'e7587bce-51c6-42be-96cd-003174eaf478'}, 'id': '58e17b53-36f1-4bdc-bfa8-8c39405e8c0a', 'is_read': True, ...}, {'color': 'green', 'created_at': '2026-01-24T01:22:00.015572+00:00', 'data': {'order_id': '0938b117-ba1c-4266-95f7-1e5617b86ec5', 'total': 514.5}, 'icon': 'shopping-cart', ...}, ...], 'unread_count': 4}, list)
